home.text: I'm passionate about Software Development 💻 and developing my skills in the field I specialize in. I consider myself responsible, disciplined and enthusiastic. I enjoy working in a team 🤝 and using those encounters to gain knowledge 📘. I'm passionate about books on personal development and the Marvel Cinematic Universe 🎬. I'm ready to face new challenges! 🚀
